name: The Phantom Knights of Cursed Javelin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影騎士団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファントム・ナイツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カースド・ジャベリン
desc:
2 Level 2 monsters
You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; until the end of this turn, change its ATK to 0, also negate its effects. This is a Quick Effect if this card has a "The Phantom Knights" card as material. You can only use this effect of "The Phantom Knights of Cursed Javelin" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 2 monsters
You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; until the end of this turn, change its ATK to 0, also negate its effects. This is a Quick Effect if this card has a "The Phantom Knights" card as material. You can only use this effect of "The Phantom Knights of Cursed Javelin" once per turn.
eff:
2 Level 2 monsters
You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; until the end of this turn, change its ATK to 0, also negate its effects. This is a Quick Effect if this card has a "The Phantom Knights" card as material. You can only use this effect of "The Phantom Knights of Cursed Javelin" once per turn.

action: Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
